title: 烟囱别墅之谜
source_file: data\raw\detectiveqa\novel_data_en\142-烟囱别墅之谜-阿加莎克里斯蒂.txt
summary:
Virginia and Bill discuss George Romilly’s request to meet her at 4:00 pm to discuss something important. Virginia, who plans to go to Larnaca, decides to cancel her plans at Rainerch to meet him. During their conversation, Bill expresses his love for Virginia, but she maintains her independence, stating she enjoys being a "bad widow" and does not wish to marry. Bill expresses dejection, mentioning a recent dinner with Dorothy Kirkpatrick.

The narrative shifts to explain that George Romilly’s plans were compromised by a mistake made by Bill. Bill, an amiable employee at the Foreign Office who serves as George's errand runner, was sent to the Whitehall Shipping Company to inquire about the arrival of the *Granaanburgh*. Due to Bill's poor pronunciation, the clerk misheard the ship's name as the *Carnfrae* and reported it would arrive the following Thursday. Consequently, George was unaware that the *Granaanburgh* had actually docked at Southampton on Monday afternoon.

At 2:00 pm, a traveler using the name Jimmy Romilly (later identified as Anthony) arrives at the Britz Hotel via taxi from Waterloo Station. While walking near Blackfriars Bridge, Anthony is bumped into by a muscular, tanned man who stares at him intently. Upon returning to his room, Anthony observes that he has transformed from an innocent-looking boy into a gaunt, tanned man. He receives a call from the hotel clerk stating that a foreigner wishes to see him. A waiter delivers a business card for Baron Lothair Rottschläger. The Baron, described as a tall man with a fan-shaped beard, arrives and informs Anthony that he is in London as a representative of the Hesslovian royal court on serious business.
